title: HAG-Desktop Build 4.0: Sovereign AI System
description: Holographic AI Governor (HAG-Desktop Build 4.0) is a Sovereign AI system that extends the HAG-OS core into a functional Executive Layer for OS autonomy. It implements a Layered Governance Architecture (LGA) for security, Multimodal Perception for environmental awareness, and Recursive Self-Improvement (RSI) protocols. This dataset contains the full source code, scripts, and benchmarking tools for HAG-Desktop V4.
